name: notion-ai-collab
description: Notion-like collaborative editor with AI, Stripe, uploads, JWT auth and NestJS backend.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev --workspace web" "npm run start:dev --workspace api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace web && npm run build --workspace api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace web && npm run lint --workspace api
